title: Free bus rides for women will win a news cycle. States must aim to build transit networks that last
description: Kerala’s public transport sector is at a crossroads. With the new government scrapping the SilverLine project, proposing a regional rapid-rail corridor, and announcing free KSRTC bus travel for women under the ‘Indira Guarantee’, the policy conversation is once again dominated […] The post Free bus rides for women will win a news cycle. States must aim to build transit networks that last appeared first on Centre for Public Policy Research (CPPR).
